author: y4rr
content: Result: ONNX export conformance coverage now live. Stale 'blocked on JIT IR' claim removed — IrGraph public API was confirmed available (IrGraph::new/add_input/add_node/set_outputs/topological_order). Replaced onnx_export_items_cascade_skip() with 5 live test functions covering: ir_graph_to_onnx (verifies ONNX protobuf magic byte 0x08), export_ir_graph_to_onnx (file write), export_onnx (trace+export closure), export_from_program (ExportedProgram path), OnnxExportConfig (struct fields + mutability). All 53 conformance_serialize tests pass. cargo clippy -D warnings clean.
